headline: Citi Assigns a Buy Rating on EQT Corporation (EQT), Following Q1 2026 Earnings
summary: ​EQT Corporation (NYSE:EQT) is one of the Best Undervalued Stocks to Buy Under $100. Recently, on May 5, Scott Gruber from Citi assigned a Buy rating on the stock and raised the price target from $66 to $70. Earlier, on April 26, Lloyd Byrne from Jefferies reiterated a Buy rating on EQT Corporation (NYSE:EQT) and […]
